verses.text: I beseech you 'by the meekness... of Christ,' base in presence but bold absent. Christ's meekness. He pleads, not bullies, in his Lord's gentle spirit.
I beseech you 'by the meekness... of Christ,' base in presence but bold absent. Christ's meekness. He pleads, not bullies, in his Lord's gentle spirit.
Our weapons are 'not carnal, but mighty through God,' 'bringing into captivity every thought to... Christ.' Spiritual war. The gospel conquers the mind, not by force.
Our weapons are 'not carnal, but mighty through God,' 'bringing into captivity every thought to... Christ.' Spiritual war. The gospel conquers the mind, not by force.
Our weapons are 'not carnal, but mighty through God,' 'bringing into captivity every thought to... Christ.' Spiritual war. The gospel conquers the mind, not by force.
Ready to avenge disobedience; ye look on outward appearance. Look deeper. They judge by show, not by truth.
Ready to avenge disobedience; ye look on outward appearance. Look deeper. They judge by show, not by truth.
I boast of our authority for edifying, not to terrify by letters. For building up. His power is to help, not to frighten.
I boast of our authority for edifying, not to terrify by letters. For building up. His power is to help, not to frighten.
They say his letters are weighty, his presence weak; as in word, so in deed. Consistent. He will be in person what he is in writing.
They say his letters are weighty, his presence weak; as in word, so in deed. Consistent. He will be in person what he is in writing.
We dare not compare ourselves with self-commenders; we keep within our measure. No self-praise. He measures himself by God's calling, not by others.
We dare not compare ourselves with self-commenders; we keep within our measure. No self-praise. He measures himself by God's calling, not by others.
We stretch not beyond our bounds, hoping to preach 'in the regions beyond you.' Onward. He longs to carry the gospel further still.
We stretch not beyond our bounds, hoping to preach 'in the regions beyond you.' Onward. He longs to carry the gospel further still.
We stretch not beyond our bounds, hoping to preach 'in the regions beyond you.' Onward. He longs to carry the gospel further still.
'He that glorieth, let him glory in the Lord'; not the self-commender is approved. Glory in God. The Lord's approval, not man's, is what matters.
'He that glorieth, let him glory in the Lord'; not the self-commender is approved. Glory in God. The Lord's approval, not man's, is what matters.
